definition: Used before a noun to refer to a single person or thing that has not been mentioned before.
e: I saw a cat sitting on the wall this morning.

definition: To leave a person, place, or thing that you are responsible for, usually permanently.
e: The captain ordered everyone to abandon the sinking ship.

definition: The physical or mental power or skill needed to do something.
e: She has a remarkable ability to solve complex mathematical problems.

definition: Having the power, skill, time, or money to do something.
e: Will you be able to come to the meeting tomorrow afternoon?

definition: To officially end a law, system, or custom.
e: Many countries chose to abolish slavery during the 19th century.

definition: The intentional ending of a pregnancy.
e: The government is debating new laws regarding access to abortion.

definition: On the subject of, or connected with something.
e: We were just talking about our plans for the summer holidays.

definition: Used to indicate an approximate amount, time, or number.
e: The journey to the city center takes about forty-five minutes.

definition: In a higher position than something else.
e: There was a beautiful painting hanging on the wall above the sofa.

definition: In or to a higher place than that previously mentioned.
e: From the mountain peak, we could see the clouds floating far above.

definition: In or to a foreign country.
e: My brother decided to study abroad in Spain for a year.

definition: The state of being away from a place or person.
e: His sudden absence from the meeting caused a lot of concern.

definition: Not present in a place, at an occasion, or as part of something.
e: Several students were absent from class today due to the flu.

definition: Total and complete; not limited in any way.
e: You must have absolute trust in your partner for the project to succeed.

definition: Used to emphasize that something is completely true.
e: I was absolutely exhausted after running the marathon.

definition: To take in or soak up a liquid or other substance.
e: Plants absorb nutrients and water from the soil through their roots.

definition: Existing in thought or as an idea but not having a physical existence.
e: Truth and beauty are often considered to be abstract concepts.

definition: Stupid or unreasonable; completely illogical.
e: It is absurd to suggest that he could have been in two places at once.

definition: A very large quantity of something.
e: The tropical island is famous for its abundance of exotic wildlife.

definition: The cruel or violent treatment of someone; the wrong use of something.
e: The report highlighted cases of power abuse within the organization.

definition: To use something for the wrong purpose in a way that is harmful.
e: He was accused of trying to abuse his position for personal gain.

definition: A person who teaches or does research at a university.
e: Many academics attended the conference to discuss the latest findings.

definition: Relating to schools, colleges, and universities.
e: The school places a strong emphasis on academic achievement.

definition: A place of study or training in a special field.
e: She was accepted into the prestigious national music academy.

definition: To begin to move more quickly.
e: The driver pressed the pedal to accelerate past the slow truck.

definition: A way of pronouncing words that is typical of a particular group or region.
e: He speaks English fluently, but he still has a strong French accent.

definition: To agree to take something that is offered.
e: She was delighted to accept the job offer from the law firm.

definition: Considered to be good enough or allowed.
e: We need to find an acceptable solution that satisfies both parties.

definition: The act of agreeing that something is true or allowed.
e: Her acceptance into the university was the highlight of her year.

definition: The right or opportunity to use or see something.
e: The building has been modified to provide better access for wheelchairs.

definition: To open a computer file or use a computer system.
e: You can access your bank account details through the mobile app.

definition: Able to be reached or entered; easy to understand.
e: The information on the website is accessible to everyone.

definition: Something bad that happens that is not expected and that causes injury or damage.
e: He was involved in a minor car accident on his way to work.

definition: By chance or by mistake; without intention.
e: I accidentally deleted the file while I was cleaning up my desktop.

definition: To provide a place to live or to be stored.
e: The new hotel is large enough to accommodate over five hundred guests.

definition: A place to live, work, or stay in.
e: The university provides student accommodation in the city center.

definition: To go somewhere with someone as a companion or escort.
e: Would you like me to accompany you to the hospital tomorrow?

definition: To finish something successfully after a lot of effort.
e: The team worked hard to accomplish their goals by the deadline.

definition: Something that is successful, or that is achieved after a lot of work.
e: Winning the gold medal was a major accomplishment for the young athlete.

definition: The state of being in agreement with a rule or request.
e: The project was carried out in accordance with the original plan.

definition: As stated by a person, book, or other source.
e: According to the weather forecast, it is going to rain this evening.

definition: In a way that is suitable or right for the situation.
e: The instructions were clear, and we acted accordingly.

definition: To form a particular amount or part of something.
e: Exports to Asia account for thirty percent of the company's revenue.

definition: An arrangement with a bank to keep your money there.
e: I opened a new savings account to prepare for my holiday.

definition: The fact of being responsible for what you do and able to explain it.
e: The new law aims to improve transparency and accountability in government.

definition: Responsible for what you do and able to explain your actions.
e: Managers should be held accountable for the performance of their teams.

definition: Someone whose job is to keep or examine the financial records of a person or organization.
e: Our accountant found several errors in the financial statement.

definition: The process of keeping and checking financial records.
e: She is studying accounting at university to become a certified professional.

definition: To collect a large number of things over a long period of time.
e: Dust and dirt tend to accumulate quickly in an empty house.
